mapper.select: SELECT b.user_number AS userNumber, s.store_id AS storeId, s.store_name AS storeName, s.store_address AS storeAddress, s.store_phone AS storePhone, s.category, s.latitude, s.longitude, s.store_image AS storeImage FROM bookmark b INNER JOIN stores s ON b.storeId = s.store_id WHERE b.user_number = #{userNumber} ORDER BY b.storeId DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bookmark (user_number, storeId, prefer) VALUES (#{userNumber}, #{storeId}, 1)
